entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary crop species under investigation for commercial hybrid feasibility.

entities.name: RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method involving repeated cycles of selection and recombination to increase the frequency of desired alleles.

entities.name: DWARF NIGERIAN COMPOSITE
entities.description: A specific population of pearl millet (NCD2) used as the base for recurrent selection.

entities.name: A4 SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific genetic system used to maintain cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility in pearl millet.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-NUCLEAR MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where the plant is unable to produce functional pollen due to cytoplasmic and nuclear interactions.

entities.name: 81A4
entities.description: A specific male-sterile line of pearl millet used in topcross hybrid evaluations.

entities.name: TOPCROSS HYBRID
entities.description: A hybrid produced by crossing a specific inbred line with a genetically diverse population or bulk.

relationships.description: Used to increase the frequency of this trait
